creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text: when using ZFS on certain SSDs, it might be preferable to run a periodic 'zpool trim' rather than using autotrim.  this patch adds a new daily script "801.trim-zfs", controlled by "daily_trim_zfs_enable" (default NO) which does a daily trim of all pools or the pools listed in "daily_trim_zfs_pools".
